name: ASRock B760M PG LIGHTNING/D4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5333+(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 with DSC - Realtek Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock B760M PG LIGHTNING/D4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX B760 gaming motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR4 support and PCIe 4.0.
